original text:
I've been getting more questions lately about what I'm going to be doing for a living starting in April, so I thought I'd write out some common answers here.
What is it exactly you'll be doing?
I'll be building web sites for companies, ministries, people, etc.
You can make a living at that? There's enough work?
I've been freelancing for 15 years now, mostly odd jobs. For the last two years things have stepped up a lot though. Work has been steady all that time, and I don't see any reason why it should slack off. I find it kind of surprising that web development has done so well in the recession.
This one comes up a lot. If you're healthy, insurance is easy to get. We're all healthy. 🙂 I'm guessing we'll pay about $200/mo for insurance, but that hasn't been settled yet.
The same place the 400 lb gorilla sits. 🙂 I'll mostly work at home, but I'm free to go wherever I'd like. Since we're also homeschooling, there's nothing to stop our family from going anywhere we want, any time we want, and I don't have to "take time off" from work.
How does your wife feel about all of this?
She's ecstatic. We came to this place in life at exactly the same time, with exactly the same desires and dreams and expectations. It's been a real blessing from God to be so in sync.
That's all I can think of at the moment, if you have any more questions, let me know and maybe I'll do another post.
Been trying to reach you and this was the last thing I could think of. Not sure if you remember me, but I have you listed as an employment reference. I have been searching for jobs and realized I haven't updated my references in awhile if this reaches you please send me an email.

original text:
All International Martial Arts Form Events need to have Doctor on event.
All athletes & Member Organisation need accept the WADA Policy.
Form Event need to Have 3 judges from each style,They are certified by International Martial Arts Federation.
Time for Form competitor 2 mint.
Junior from 10-17 Years Old.
Senior From 18 Years Old.
All Form Athletes need to have International Martial Arts Member Passport for documentation of medical examinations.
Arena for Form Event is, 8 Meter X 8 Meter Standard soft puzzle mat for Martial Arts.
Martial Arts Self-Defense Time for Form competitor 2 mint. And Team Self-Defense Show max 4 person.
Absolutely Not hard contacts, and all technics must be controled.
For more safety of Junior Fighters,Ring Referee for Junior must have many years Experience!
Junior Class fights shall be scheduled for two (2) rounds with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
Each round will consist of two (2) minutes with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
With the split designs will be a one ( 1 ) round more.
Fighters with a record of up to four (4) fights with no more than 2 wins that have not fought professionally qualify for B Class.
Each round will consist of three (3) minutes with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
Fighters with a record of five (5) or more fights that have not fought professionally qualify.
Each round will consist of three (3) minutes duration with a one (1) minute rest period between rounds.
 trousers,T-shirt upper part of the body.
 trousers,T-shirt or ladies top.
If some fighter have not ,Fighter or National organisation or sport club can recive at the weigh-in on event.
Weigh-ins will vary depending on whether a fight is a professional or amateur event.
The official weigh-in for a professional fight will occur between 12 and 24 hours before the scheduled fight.
All INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA MARTIAL ARTS FEDERATIONS competitions must have a doctor.
All contestants are examined by a doctor at the weigh-in!
Medical , blood pressure, pulse ,lungs, hearing, teeth, hernia, muscle, skin.
INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA FEDERATION.© All Judges and referee need to have 2 courses in year for better practice.
Signal's the respective point judges a red or black hand to announce the round winer.
A fighter who has sustained a KO or TKO in a fight must wait a minimum of sixty 60 days before engaging in another fight.
INTERNATIONAL SPORT SANDA MARTIAL ARTS FEDERATION.S-1© will report.

original text:
SOS Primer Get your colour fix.
SOS Primer is inspired by the concept of the colour wheel: two opposite shades cancel each other out. Turn the wheel to discover the colour that will target your beauty concern!
In just a few seconds, this corrective primer brightens all types of complexions and captures light for spectacular results.
Essential allies in fighting a dull complexion, this primer's pink pigments instantly revitalise the complexion and restore its fresh appearance.
We've got a solution that's just peachy!
Beige pigments mask the purplish tint of imperfections, including dark circles, visible veins, etc. to leave the complexion looking fresh and flawless.
Try coral on for size!
Orange pigments allow this corrective primer to counterbalance blueish pigmentation spots to instantly even out complexion irregularities.
Need to get rid of yellow?
Lavish your complexion with lavender!
Lavender pigments counterbalance the yellowish tone of skin which is asphyxiated by pollution. The skin's clarity is restored.
Like a beautifying filter, this corrective primer containing green pigments diminishes the look of redness. The complexion is balanced and the skin is soothed.
Apply SOS Primer all over your face after your regular day cream. Use alone, under your regular foundation or mix with your foundation.
Apply a small amount of primer to areas to correct, then lightly dab your foundation over it.
If several of these beauty concerns apply to you, you may combine several shades of SOS Primer.
Convenient and travel-friendly, the pump tube guarantees precise, mess-free use in any situation. Ideal for quick, ultra-simple and targeted application!
For even more spectacular results, mix SOS Primer with Instant Smooth Perfecting Touch Primer. Its incredibly lightweight and smooth formula glides onto the skin to smooth and fill fine lines and wrinkles in under a minute. The skin is smoothed, and the complexion appears even, radiant and balanced.
now try it for yourself!
**Satisfaction test - 2 weeks - 498 women.
More than just colour, a formula that cares for the skin.
SOS Primer is made with organic sea lily extract to deliver 24-hour hydration* to the skin.
The fine, weightless texture lets the skin breathe, and it is formulated with the Clarins anti-pollution complex to protect the skin from environmental stressors.
*Hydration kinetics - 24 hours - 11 women.
A glowing complexion and flawless-looking make-up... Thanks to its High Lumitech complex, SOS Primer instantly corrects, brightens and revives the complexion: diffusion of light is multiplied and imperfections are masked through an optical effect.
... Thanks to a texture that blends flawlessly into the skin! Lightweight, refreshing and oil-free: the fluid texture of SOS Primer offers easy application and leaves the skin feeling comfortable all day long. The complexion is evened out, and make-up hold is prolonged.
This spring, look as fresh and beautiful as a rose!
